subject: [patch 05/14] genirq: Expose nr_irqs in core code

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about potential build breakage due to a typo in HYPERV_REENLIGHTMENT and a similar issue with the text description. Also pointed out that the patch drops prec-based alignment for ERR and MIS.

2026-03-09.patch_summary: The patch introduces changes to the irqstats array, but some reviewers have raised concerns about potential issues and typos.
